PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Mar-09-2017 is admitted to probate. The Northern Trust Company is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-01-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-22-2021 Continued To Oct-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Tachiki, via ZOOM, for The Northern Trust Company.

Mr. Tachiki at the outset advises the court that some of the notices that were mailed to interested parties regarding this hearing had been returned to his firm as undeliverable. Counsel advises that they will be attempting to issue notice to the interested parties via updated addresses.

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to Oct-20-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Saephan. Not reported.
